'''thadhudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foeman|foeman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foeman|foeman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thadhudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thædhidith|thædhidith]] || [[word:thædhidij|thædhidij]] || [[word:thædhidish|thædhidish]] || [[word:thædhidi|thædhidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhudhuduth|thadhudhuduth]] || [[word:thadhudhuduj|thadhudhuduj]] || [[word:thadhudhudush|thadhudhudush]] || [[word:thadhudhudu|thadhudhudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhuduth|thadhuduth]] || [[word:thadhuduj|thadhuduj]] || [[word:thadhudush|thadhudush]] || [[word:thadhudu|thadhudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhufduth|thadhufduth]] || [[word:thadhufduj|thadhufduj]] || [[word:thadhufdush|thadhufdush]] || [[word:thadhufduf|thadhufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thadhuduthu|thadhuduthu]] || [[word:thadhuduju|thadhuduju]] || [[word:thadhudushu|thadhudushu]] || [[word:thadhuduku|thadhuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thadhuduth|thadhuduth]] || [[word:thadhuduj|thadhuduj]] || [[word:thadhudush|thadhudush]] || [[word:thadhudu|thadhudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thadhuduthul|thadhuduthul]] || [[word:thadhudujul|thadhudujul]] || [[word:thadhudushul|thadhudushul]] || [[word:thadhudukul|thadhudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thadhuduthuthu|thadhuduthuthu]] || [[word:thadhudujuju|thadhudujuju]] || [[word:thadhudushushu|thadhudushushu]] || [[word:thadhuduku|thadhuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thadhuduthun|thadhuduthun]] || [[word:thadhudujun|thadhudujun]] || [[word:thadhudushun|thadhudushun]] || [[word:thadhudukun|thadhudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thadhuduthuoro|thadhuduthuoro]] || [[word:thadhudujuoro|thadhudujuoro]] || [[word:thadhudushuoro|thadhudushuoro]] || [[word:thadhudukuoro|thadhudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
